title: AB03 - Finance Ops Coordinator
description:
Position title : Finance Assistant 
Location: Balestier
Working day: Mon - Fri 
Working hours : 9am - 6pm
Salary : $2500 - $3500

OVERVIEW: 

The Finance Assistant will provide day-to-day support to the Finance Manager and Finance team in accounting, reporting, and finance operations. The role focuses on ensuring accurate record-keeping, assisting with financial transactions, and supporting compliance and internal processes.

JOB SCOPES

Accounting Operations: 

  • Assist in maintaining accounts, including Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, General Ledger, and Fixed Assets Register.
  • Support staff and program teams by responding to routine financial queries.
  • Assist in reconciling accounts and ensuring accurate data entry.

Financial Reporting:

  • Support month-end and year-end closing activities.
  • Prepare basic financial reports and schedules as required.
  • Assist in consolidating financial information for management review.

Budgeting Support: 

  • Assist in annual budget preparation and mid-year review exercises.
  • Help monitor budget performance and prepare simple variance reports.

Audit Support:

  • Provide support during internal and statutory audits by preparing schedules and documents as directed.
  • Assist in liaising with auditors for information requests.

Internal Controls and Compliance:

  • Help ensure compliance with internal policies, procedures, and accounting standards.
  • Assist in maintaining proper documentation and records for audit purposes.
  • Recommend minor improvements to accounting processes as directed.

Other Duties:

  • Perform ad hoc finance and administrative duties as assigned by the Finance Manager.

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • NITEC / Higher NITEC / Diploma in Accountancy / Progress toward ACCA/CA qualifications, or equivalent.
  • 1–2 years of accounting or finance support experience (experience in preschool, education, or social service sector is advantageous).
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (Excel, Word, Outlook).
  • Basic knowledge of accounting systems and processes.
  • Familiarity with maintaining accounts and assisting in reporting.
  • Been exposure to charity fund accounting or not-for-profit finance. 

If you are keen to apply, please send me your resume and job applied for on WhatsApp at 8093 8699 or email me at anabel.thesupreme@gmail.com (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

❄️Anabel Boon Xue Qi | Consultant Associate (R25159272) |📍The Supreme HR Advisory EA No: 14C7279
